issues.title: WSL 2.7.10 / kernel 6.18.33.2: Codex CLI triggers unrecoverable VMA/munmap deadlock
issues.next_action_reason: New, well-documented kernel deadlock with logs already attached; label kernel/needs-investigation/wsl2 and route to kernel team — do not re-ask for logs.
issues.suggested_reply: Thanks for the exceptionally detailed report — the SysRq w/t dumps and WslLogs are exactly what we need. The traces point at an mmap_lock (VMA write-semaphore) stall: `sqlx-sqlite-worker` is stuck in `__vm_munmap` while another thread waits in `rwsem_down_write_slowpath`, leaving threads unkillable in D state. We're tagging this for kernel investigation. If you can capture `cat /proc/<codex-pid>/stack` for the stuck threads and note whether it also reproduces on the latest kernel in `wsl --update --pre-release`, that will help narrow it further.
